step_rationale: Lymphocyte-recruiting chemokine; LV dilation association suggests plaque-inflammation and remodeling response.
mechanism: Chemokine mediating lymphocyte recruitment in plaque inflammation and post-MI ventricular remodeling.

references.title: Identifying the molecular and cellular signature of cardiac dilation following myocardial infarction.
references.journal: Biochimica et biophysica acta. Molecular basis of disease
